from source import find_in_sorted

def test_find_in_sorted_last_element():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    target = 7
    expected_index = len(arr) - 1
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, target)
    assert result == expected_index, f"Expected index {expected_index} for target {target}, got {result}"

from source import find_in_sorted
import pytest

def test_find_in_sorted_target_above_max_returns_minus_one():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, 10)
    assert result == -1, f"Expected -1 when searching for a value greater than the maximum element, got {result}"
